dialog.content: That must be a real challenge and if it is a recent change it is natural to feel concerned about this.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh really? I hope so I'm worried that it isn't natural since I haven't always been like this

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I do not always feel positive and motivated myself and have spoken to a professional in the past which helped me understand why this is, for me it was linked to a lack of sleep.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh so me feeling this way could be a result of other things that maybe aren't at the healthiest in my life?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: People's moods can be regulated by many things. I know for example that sleep and diet can play a big part in some cases.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
I feel like I eat okay and I get enough sleep, but I do work a lot. Very long days and I feel drained at the end of the day. That seems like the obvious reason, but usually I'm still able to do stuff afterwards...
 So I'm not sure if that is truly why

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: have you tried talking to your friends and telling them now you feel? They may not know you are feeling this may and might be able to help you and provide support.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's true, I haven't really talked to them about it. I usually have a hard time opening up

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What is it about opening up that you find difficult? is it sharing your feelings with others?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I guess I'm scared I'm going to come across weaker to them

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think you have reached out for support and so you clearly want to do something about this which is a great first step. I think you can get over these fears and overcome them.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah. It's just easier for me to do it anonymously but I do need to talk to the people that are important to me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can tell you are anxious about it and fear coming across as weak but I think that would be a positive step for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yeah, I think so too :)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think you can do it and overcome this issue!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are welcome

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'll do my best

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Thanks for talking it through

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for listening. I hope you have a great day!

situation: My roommates for next semester do not respect COVID safety or social distancing.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello, how are you today?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi. How is life treating you at the moment? Would you like to talk about any problems?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you! And it is good except for one problem. I am in college and my roommates for next semester do not care about COVID -- they continue to go out and party. This upsets me and I have talked to them about it but they still do not care.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you feel that you are being put in danger by the actions of your room-mate?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, absolutely. I do not want to get covid and am worried about long term health effects. I have shared this with them but they still do not care.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can totally understand how you feel.  I absolutely hate how some people are pretending that the pandemic is not real and they do not need to worry.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Also, I am in a triple room in my sorority house for clarification. I feel my risk getting it in the room is high if they continue to not respect guidelines.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do not worry, your fears are totally grounded. Some people really just need to grow up and get educated.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I agree and appreciate that I am not alone in thinking that! Many college students have been very irresponsible during the pandemic which is upsetting to me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there anyone at your college who could help you with this? Perhaps move you into a single room?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: No, there aren't any sorority rooms available at my sorority house and all of the dorms/apartments are full already but I've tried  **single not sorority

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes they certainly have. They seem to think that it will never happen to them and do not realise that they are putting others at risk

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: agreed

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible for you to take some time off school?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I shouldn't do that -- I am applying to law school when I graduate so I feel like it'd be a bad look. it'd also be bad for my mental health to stay home, and I'd rather take the classes I need next semester

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you feel as though you are trapped .. you can't leave school but at the same time you are being put at risk through no fault of your own

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: right, it's very uncomfortable and no matter how many times I tell them how risky they are being to not only themselves but others they do not care also one of them is pre med which is even worse lmao

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Please be assured that you are being sensible and that they are the ones at fault

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank u :)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Let's hope that this is over soon .. this has been an absolutely terrible year.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Agreed! Hoping for that vaccine soon  what challenges have you faced from the pandemic?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Here in the UK they have started to roll it out.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am so jealous! Things are so much better not in the USA!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I have to agree ;) But we have a large infection and death rate here too, largely due to government irresponsibility

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: haha yes we had the same issue with government mishandling everything ... so frustrating

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you feel it would be better to be somewhere like New Zealand then, where there have been very few cases? It is a lovely country.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: haha yes definitely! I would love to study abroad next year so I hope that will still be an option and COVID will be better then

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So, you feel frustrated both by your roommate and also the conditions in your country?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes for sure

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can sincerely wish that the world is in a better place next year

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: As do I... although I'm not sure if things will ever go back to the way they were before. But hopefully that is for the best

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Perhaps we can learn something from this year and improve ourselves

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I agree! It's definitely been a year of reflection for sure

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hope I have been able to be of some help, just by allowing you to talk things out

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes thank you you definitely have! enjoy the rest of your evening :)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And you too .. thanks for talking!

situation: We had a staff appreciation day, but we all got drunk by the end of the day. So now I am worried my boss will judge me or fire me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hello

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hi

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: can you talk about your feelings at this time

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Currently I am worried to show up to work. We had a staff appreciation Thursday and we all got super drunk in front of our boss, and I am honestly scared he will judge me or fire me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: that's really hard, have you spoken to any of your coworkers

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, we are all laughing at the matter, but you can tell our boss is looking at us different. We all showed up to work Friday hungover, and he just made lots of comments and jokes to play the part, but you can tell he is looking at me and everyone different. I do not know how to redeem myself.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I would recommend speaking with him privately about the issue one on one

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That sounds a lot easier said than done. I was the one who was the most drunk. But I do now know if he knows how drunk we all got since he left after one of us got hit in the face with a golf club and had to take her to the ER. So what if I say too much and apologize for what he does not know.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: have you tried reaching out a company hotline or maybe an hr department in your company to speak about this issue anonymously this could help with the tension between you and your boss

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He is the doctor of the office and the 2 office managers were pretty drunk too. It was a hot mess if I have to be honest and being an office full of girls I feel like we went too far. I for one feel embarrassed, and feel like just not saying anything and it will fade away. But I know the next few weeks will be a little hard, for all of us. This one is for the books, and something I have never encountered in my 10 years of working.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I see how you feel do you think letting it fade is the best option in the long run?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think so. Somethings are sometimes better left unsaid. I just feel like avoiding it, but I do not know if anyone else would do the same. What would you do?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I would apologize for my behavior to the manager if it was me. Just to seem professional and get in my bosses good grace.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: You have guts. I think I will work on that and build the guts to talk to my boss if I ever have to. Thank you for that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are doing your best and I think you will make the right decision that works for you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: You are right. In the end I will do the right thing, even if it takes me some time to get there.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is anything else bother you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Just that. I think you helped me with the only issue I currently have.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am happy to help!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: you're welcome

situation: I want more online jobs in this pandemic nut hard to find.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi, how are you feeling? Is there anything on your mind?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What would you like to talk to me about today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
yes I would like to find more jobs, hopefuly online

 do you have any suggestions?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Unfortunately I think that a lot of people are trying to find online work right now as people are too scared to go out - I know that I am!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
haha, i am the same 
 Mturk really helps as my side job

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It can be very good yes. Have you tried any other sort of gig work?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I heard finally Antarctica got Coronavirus

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh wow, that is really bad. At least there aren't very many people there .. I think it's mainly research people.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have applied for them but never got them. So I am trying to become a YouTuber

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you feel that perhaps you could make some money by vlogging?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes who wants to live in Antarctica lol

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think it would be fun to visit but not for very long.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: possibly, problem is that i don't want to show myself online, what do you think about wearing a full face mask and do youtube?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, perhaps you could vlog about the need to wear facemasks?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I think that is a great idea. Full mask is better than a partial mask

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes it is! Beware that there are a lot of people trying to make money on youtube though - you need to get lucky.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Right, thanks for your advice, They do any crazy stuff to make money

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's a difficult time for us all :) People are doing what they have to in order to put food on their tables I think.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i know right, when in desperation people go crazy

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am hopeful that with the vaccine having been developed, things might start to improve shortly.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
i want to be prepared before I go into that state
 I hope so too
1

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Can you think of things to look forward to in the New Year that might cheer you up a little?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: oh yes the stock price may keep going up. Like Tesla, that cheears me up

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, maybe the change of administration in some parts of the world will help a little.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: what do you mean?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I mean that political change can help people and give them fresh hope. Or, depress them :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Oh yes
 They're gonna give out 600 dollars to us I hope

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That would be a big help for people who are struggling!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Right now I am not too desperate and can enjoy listening to Christmas songs,

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Christmas is a good time of year but it is also expensive. Do you think that it has increased your financial woes?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It is a beautiful time. Not really, as I did not buy any expensive gifts etc

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am glad to hear that .. too many people think they have to spend too much. Anyway I hope you have had a lovely day and all the best to you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: well, thank you for your advice. It was great taoking to you. Merry Christmas

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And you!

situation: Have been mostly unemployed since release from prison. This has effected my self impression.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi. Currently unemployed and this effects my impression of self as a person, husband and father. Doing mturk work and created a Youtube channel to share information gleaned during prison time.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Hi there.
 I understand how are you feeling. I have been looking for job for the past 5 months and it is a huge challenge.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sorry to hear of you own challenge. Job search sites seem to have so much garbage out there.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you been looking online and try to apply for other jobs?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, have emails coming in from several sites. At the same time though been helping out elderly parents with doctors, cleaning, cooking, etc. How about you?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I know most of them is not helpful and somethimes waste of time. It is important that you keep ypurself busy during this time

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hence doing the mturk work and creating content for the Youtube channel. This is part creative and hopefully income producing in the future.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
I'm doing some kinda gig jobs too. I have been selling a lot things on Ebay, same thing  i can use my creativity and dont let my mind go crazy
 Yes, I believe Youtube channel is a great source for new opportunities nowadays  Everybody is facing a challenge time right now, we are all together on this

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sounds like a similar situation. Not sure if these efforts will pay off long term but need to do something to maintain sanity. Youtube can pay something if there are enough hits and subscribers.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sure, in short term is a good choice. The most impoetant thing is looking foward always. For long term we are going to figure out something else

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Having a religious base too can help.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: For me this is the powerful tool, I pray every single day We need to be grateful for beeb alive and for been health.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Unfortunately, too many are at the base of the hill of the Lord and not climbing. Followers, not disciples. Hard to have gratitude when seeing other or thinking of our past.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes but still has few that are on the right path. We need to keep our faith

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Encourage you to continue your journey. This life is but a blip in the eternal spectrum.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sure soon we are going to see the lights at the end of the tunnel.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Unfortunately making amends in some ways depends on having money which requires a job.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What do like to do on your free time?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Working on a notebook of studies I did during my prison time. Content that is becoming the Youtube channel. Also work out to stay fit and mentally healthy

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sounds interesting. I wish I had more ideas to do youtube as well but  I am not good doing this things.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for the effort. This task seems to be taking longer than I thought.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes Im working out too not much as i wish. Thank you

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hard to work out when your bummed  Going to sign out now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Everything seens to be great effort I Know Okay thank you for your time

situation: I think that i am gaining weight and hard as i try I can not keep it off and i am getting vry put down.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hi there.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello. How are you feeling today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am feeling pretty down about my appearance.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I get that way too. Is there any particular cause or aspect you are focussed on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It is mainly my weight i just can't seem to loose any and it is making me quite sad.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Gosh I am very sorry to hear that you are struggling to loose weight and it is making you sad. May I ask what you are doing to attempt to loose the weight? I hear cardio is very good for that.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Well i do use my bike. But i really struggle with motivation and i know i snack too much. But i have just been too busy to spend any real time facing the problem, you know?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I totally understand. I was the same way over worked and under motivated. I found that mixing in low impact weight work outs was really effective as well as each morning setting out healthy snacks that way i don't have to think about getting something it is already there.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh that is a good idea what do you suggest?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Honestly my top favorite are chocolate covered almonds and sugar snap peas. have you tried lowering your carb and increasing your protein intake?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: No i hadn't thought about that don't you have to only drink protein if your work out.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Typically yes but having a low protein shake, ie one scoop not too, everyday is a great way to supplement your caloric intake with protein. You will find yourself less hungry and have more energy through the day.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That actually makes a lot of sense. What about motivation i really need help with that i find when i am less motivated i am deffinitely more depressed.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Lots of people also struggle with depressive episodes and low motivation. Don't worry you are not alone. It is important to try and think is it depression related low motivation or vice versa.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thats true how can you tell. it is really hard for me right now.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's ok. Don't worry everything will be ok. Remember little steps forward are better and easier to achieve. even if it seems really bad right now just know it will always get better.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thats true.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Just by talking to you I can tell you are down, but you also seem a lot more receptive and motivated that i think you realize. I am sure you can make the changes and succeed.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you so much. Sometimes it just takes someone believing in you

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Of course everyone needs support now and again and it has been a real pleasure talking to you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks, you too I have a lot to think about. But talking it out really helped. Have a nice day!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Of course good luck stay happy!!

situation: Long day of work. Came home early, ended up catching my partner having an affair with my roommate

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello. Is anyone here?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hello

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I need a bit of advice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sure, what is going on?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
My partner of 4 years... i never thought this would happen but they ended up cheating on me
 Caught them in the act
 With my roommate I can't believe this. We've been together for 4 years. All of their stuff is in the same house we are living in
 Should I kick them out???

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am truly sorry you had to witness that. Would you feel more comfortable with them leaving or do you think either relationship is salvagable?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
That's my current problem. I do still love them but... what would happen if I stay and we work on our relationship?
 Do you think it would be a good idea to solve the relationship and stay?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If you feel that something might be salvageable it might be worth looking into. Do you think they'd be open to sitting down and talking it out?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
They did end up crying and saying that it was a mistake. I don't know if it would be a good idea. I think I would have feelings of regret
 The trust wouldn't be there anymore.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think that either way you choose to proceed there is always the choice of remaining amicable. You're all adults, so sitting down and discussing what comes next is an inevitability. Maybe they will choose to leave, or you'll decide it would be better for you to go, but at least the discussion would be ongoing to perhaps resume the friendship at a later time?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'll give it a shot to talk with them. Do you think there would be hateful feelings even if we decided to resume the friendship?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: If you're trying your best to move on and the other party ends up with hateful feelings then I feel like at least you gave it your best right? It might be worth laying low for a little while to sort through the feelings of mistrust and betrayal.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. I probably will give it some time to decide on a best course of action. I just needed someone to talk to.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm glad I could help

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks again friend! Do your recommend for me to talk right away?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I would talk to them as soon as you feel comfortable enough to do so. It might get awkward and leave people to come to other conclusions if it's avoided for too long.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's true. Right now I think it would be too awkward to talk

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is completely understandable. Maybe take a day or two to collect your thoughts. Do you have somewhere to be alone to sift through your feelings?

situation: I realize my career won't pay much and I feel bad for choosing it

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: hi there! how are you doing?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I feel ashamed thinking of my future career

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Can you tell me a little about what you feel ashamed about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: whenever we have family gathering, my aunts and uncles would brag about how much their children make. I have higher degree but will only make half of their salary so I feel bad

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So, you feel that your family is judging you for your earning potential?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes, my parents won't say it to me but they never show they're proud either

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am very sorry for that. They should be proud that you have such a good degree!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: What's good if it doesn't translate to my earnings.  I wonder if I should start over with some better degree, but it's expensive

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think you are coming at this from the wrong perspective. Life is not all about money you know!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I want to think otherwise but it's difficult, especially when capitalism is everything nowadays

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you think that you enjoy your current field even though it is not as well paid as it could be?  Do you think that you enjoy your current field even though it is not as well paid as it could be?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I enjoy it, I did some internship and it was nice

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think that you should focus on how much you enjoy it. After all you will be working for the next few decades so you do not want to do something that you hate just because it pays well.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Is there anyway for me to change my way of thinking? I keep worrying about all the expense that I'll have to spend and what if I can't afford because of how much I earn

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible for you to talk to your parents about this? It seems to me that they  are at the root of your problems

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I don't really want to talk to them, I'm not very close to them and rarely tell them my problems

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, if you are not close to them does their opinion really count for so much?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: it still affects me nonetheless

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I do understand how hard it can be to shake off your family's preconceptions and expectations even though you are not close to them

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you for understanding

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are very welcome. Please know that this is a very common problem and a lot of people feel the way that you are feeling now.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: it's tough when I look around and everyone seems to do better than me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you think that you might benefit from some counselling to help you overcome your self esteem issues?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I've thought about thaat but I'm not in a financial situation to afford that

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can provide you with a list of places that will offer a few counselling sessions for free. I think you need to be able to talk this out with a professional.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: that would be great

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think that you need to accept that your parents' opinion should not colour your whole life

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yeah I should start doing that and not let others affect me Thank you very muchh for talking with me

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Once your self esteem picks up a little I think that you will find that it's very much easier to ignore other people's input.
 You are very welcome! I wish you well in the months to come.

situation: My son has moved back from NYC and does not like my boyfriend.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello How may I help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
hi
 I am stressed with my 25 year old moved back from NYC. . My boyfriend and I have a home and my son does not like him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am sorry to hear that i can understand how you must be feeling Why does your son not like your boyfriend?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He is going back to school and I am supporting him in that. The problem is that my boyfriend thinks my son should speak to me more respectfully. He gets upset when my son is swears and shows anger to me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you talked to your boyfriend about how you are feeling?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He knows that I am torn. I am not going to put my son out of the house. I am also not one to get loud and angry. My son verbally is aggressive.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand why your boyfriend be getting upset if your son is disrespectful to you and is aggressive but you know that is your son and you going to be there for him no matter what

dialog.speaker: seeker

situation: My girlfriend and I broke up due to all the fights we were having. It was mutual but it was still sad. I felt as if my life had ended and everything was in black and white. I was sad for a year afterwards.

dialog.content: Well, although it sounds like a cliche, time does help with healing wounds. It took me a while to get over a break up. We had been together eight years!

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
What did you do to cope in the first year of losing your partner
?

Well, I do love to write but sometimes the

dialog.speaker: supporter

I should do that. I've had a hard time connecting
 with counselors in the past but maybe that could work.

dialog.speaker: supporter

situation: struggling with my demons

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Good evening, how are you tonight?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: i'm struggling with my depression, I can't seem to get a handle on it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm really sorry to hear that.  What kinds of things have you been doing so far to manage your downswing?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I just keep reliving that moment in my head

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Lots of obsessive, intrusive thoughts?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: yes, they just keep popping up  can't stop it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: When I get stuck in that loop, I try to change up my entire physical situation -- take a shower or a soak, change up my music if I'm listening to it.  Kind of force my brain to take in a change.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I tried, I tried to keep myself busy, but boom my depressions hits me like a brick wall.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you ever explored medication?  I was diagnosed with bipolar disorder almost two years ago, and medication has made an enormous difference for me.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no my doctor prescribed me meds but it's not working. I will try meditation see it works. any more ideas?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You should definitely see if the doctor can adjust your meds, I have ended up on a completely different type of medication than the one I tried first.  But I understand.  I think you should try getting out of the house and enjoying fresh air and physical activity.  It won't cure your depression but it may help your headspace and your point of view.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hate taking meds. just keep reliving that moment. can't get it out of my head. it's killing

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you written it down?  Like physically written it down?  Sometimes when I have the obsessive thoughts, I'll do that and being able to see it "in real life" satisfies my brain. But if you're reliving a traumatic moment, it may be beneficial to seek out a licensed therapist who can help you process and move past the moment.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I will take your advice and right down my thoughts , maybe it will help the pain  I have, I've been seeing a therapist. his not much help I think but it's someone I can talk too

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hope it helps you out, you don't deserve to feel constant pain.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thank you I hope so too

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You seem motivated to get better, so I am confident you will be successful.  You deserve to feel wonderful.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: thanks for the confidence. I hope so to  you've been very helpful

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I'm glad to hear that!  Thank you!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no problem , hope you a better day than me

situation: I got fired from my job during the pandemic, I don't know if I'll be able to find another job.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, How can I help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm scared about my future

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Can you tell me more about why you are scared for the future?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I got fired because of Covid, and I don't know how I'll be able to find a job and have an income.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It seems that Covid has had a negative effect on your employment and financial insecurity is weighing heavily on you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes that is correct, and with the job market, how am I supposed to find a secured job.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand that feeling of insecurity, and how helpless you feel. I myself have been in the position of loss of income and financial insecurity in the past, and while it was hard while I was in the valley, I was able to walk out of it with some valuable lessons.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true, I just have to work hard for myself. I am learning valuable lessons like the idea that companies don't care about their workers, etc. Working more on myself sounds like the better option.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It sounds like you are already identifying areas of self improvement. A person with confidence in themselves and the ability to reflect and grow are promising attributes potential employers look for.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for all that you've done today, I couldn't get through it without you dude. Thank you for your time today, hearing my concerns about the future!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are so welcome. I know that you will succeed in your employment search as you have the skills and humility that potential employers are looking for.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'll continue to keep on the lookout for new job opportunities, as well as improving myself for the long term. I appreciate it!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: As you continue your job search, can you think of ways that you could trim your cost of living for the short term? Returning to the basics for a time could help save you money while you take the next steps with your career. Things like planning meals ahead of time, using items you already have instead of buying new, letting go of subscriptions you don't use daily or don't deem necessary.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I could definitely reduce my spending like going out less for fast food, cutting my Netflix and Hulu subscriptions, and prepare my own meals for the next week weeks, as I try to find a new job. This would definitely help with my concerns about income and financial security.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Our lifestyle seems to be all about convenience and instant gratification, I myself being guilty of wanting those as well. But I think when we strip our needs down to the basics for a while we allow ourselves to find what is really necessary, as well as what is truly important to us.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Very true, people definitely need to find their fitting for when things go wrong. Failure or bad events give us time to think about the important things in life, as well as our true needs.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And it is important to remember that everyone goes through cycles of feast or famine, and that when you are walking through a famine you yourself are not a failure. As long as you know you are doing your best to succeed under the circumstances you have been handed, you will never truly be a failure to yourself or to others.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you, this has really helped me overcome my anxiety and fears of the events from the past year!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am so glad you have been able to look within yourself to see that you have all the resources you need to handle this period of life. You have a optimistic attitude and a can do spirit, and those will take you far!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for your time, I'll have to be leaving now, this will help me for sure!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Enjoy the rest of your day!

situation: I have had a lady who has been a friend for one year now. We have been in good terms until recently when she no longer has time for me and she does not explain the reason for the same. dialog.content: I am currently facing some sadness. I have had a fiancee whom we have been in good terms for the past one year. She has suddenly changed and no longer has ime for me. I have prompted her on several occasions but she does not respond to my calls and texts.I have requested her so that we meet and talk but she is not willing either. I am confused what to do at this time i need her support the most

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So what I hear you saying is that you are engaged and your fiance will not speak to you.  However, you are  unsure as to why she is behaving this way?  Is that correct?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yea i really dont know the reason behind the breakup coz all along we  have been in good terms and can hardly remember us having a disagreement

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Unfortunately sometimes people do just grow apart.  There may not be any concrete reason behind it.  It appears that, for whatever reason, she does not want to talk.  I can understand how this would be upsetting and that it would be hard to obtain closure and move on.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Sure. I really dont know what to do in this case

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Have you tried emailing her?  Perhaps she would be willing to explain in a more neutral environment?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Well, i haven`
t tried an email. I have only called her severally, sent her message via whatsapp and facebook.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It might be an option.  Maybe just lay out how you feel in it, and just ask her for an explanation perhaps.  It might be good to let her know that "I understand it's over, but could you help me understand why so that I can close this chapter" - perhaps she would respond to something like that.  If she doesn't, then you are going to have to make some hard decisions and try to process this. It's a very hard position to be in, but life is too beautiful to be miserable, and I know you would rather be happy.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content:
Sure i also want to be happy but we have shared so much in common and were in process of starting something good to help generate income. She had the idea and i had the capital. I feel this will really be a wasted opprtunity
  Is there anything else i can do to salvage the situation?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are going to have to lay it all on the line with her, but be prepared for her to not respond in the way that you want.  Sometimes we do the best we can, and it still doesn't change the situation.  Just know that her decision does not mean you are unworthy, it just means that she is not worthy of you - but someone else is and then it would be time to go and find them.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Wow. This is interesting. Thanks for this reminder. I gonna consider this idea and move on then. Thanks for this support

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are more than welcome.  I know it's hard, but sometimes the rain has to come before the rainbow!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Ok thank you. I will apply your advice and see how it will turn out. Thank you once more

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I wish you the best of luck!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Ok. Goodbye

dialog.content: Thank you!! im going to look him up . Has your anxiety come back?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Somethings its want to come back but i am on top of it and always being discipline with myself. I make sure to love myself first and give myself priority.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for everything .I am now motivated to get going.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You are welcomed i am glad i was able to help out. Stay positive and healthy.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: What kind of teas do you drink to help with anxiety?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I drink a lot of chamomile tea with honey which has a great flavor good to calm done, i drink mint tea very refreshing and tilo tea which helps me sleep.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I never tried tea , this new for me . I will definitely order some online. DO you have any other suggestions?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes of course. If you worried about some kind of sickness i would recommend you go to the doctor get yourself a full checkup  it will help calm you mind down and reassure you that you are healthy.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That a greay idea. My health anxiety its at all high levels everything i see about a sickness i get worry especially with this covid -19. I barely go out and get nervous. Has that happened to you?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, once in while i get nervous about but i try to keep positive and take the right precautions and wear my mask, clea my hands and stay my distance. you shouldnt have a issues .   Do you workout?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: No, i havent felt motivated . What kind of workout do you recommend for my anxiety?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What really worked for me was cycling. Since its a great cardio workout and its fun. You would enjoy it. Maybe you can get a friend and try it out.

situation: in this covid time , my job in trouble .I tested covid positive and unble to attended my office hours fro 2 months .My manager thought i joined another company but i was not yet all healthy to do  any job .And i became pregnant in this covid time .I scaring how can i handle baby and job .I need much money but my manager not agree to give job

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Depending on people is not a sign of weakness so don't hesitate ask for help. Connections unfortunately lead to many opportunities in life.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So I would  suggest updating the resume, submitting at least 3 applications a day, finding some  references, performing volunteer work  to build your resume, lastly perhaps start up a new hobby or develop your skills in your free time.

situation: SInce my divorce, I am constantly worried about being able to pay my bills and general sad most of the time.  The Covid issue is making it worst.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, how can i help you today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Just feeling sad

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Tell me more. What has you feeling sad?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Not being able to leave the house with Covid. plus my hours were cut at work.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I completely understand. I am also going through the same. I have not left my house in weeks. While I am able to work from home, my hours were also cut.  What would help you feel better about the situation? What are you doing to pass the time?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes it sucks.  I live alone now so there really hard sometimes. I tend to watch tv and lot and watch YouTube videos.  Nothing productive.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I also live alone. So I can understand how you are feeling. You are not alone in this situation. Although you may feel that way. Have you tried connecting with friends via text, video call, etc? Sometimes that helps, even if it's not the same as face to face.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, I have one close friend that I talk to every now and then.  Its not like it use to be.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Don't feel like you need to do a lot to be productive. Even getting up to watch tv is still getting up to do something. That's still a win.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: We used to be able to go out and have a few beers together.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That's good. Keep that connection. It's not going to be the same due to the circumstances. But at least you are seeking to keep that connection, and that is a good thing.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I hope that this vaccine thing is reason and we can get back to the norm.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What I found helped somewhat was joining a few social groups online. find something you like and find a group related to that. For example, I love horror movies, so I joined a horror movie group on Facebook. While it's not face to face, it is a good opportunity to just connect with others about a common interest.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Good idea..

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am hoping they get the vaccine going as well. But I am hoping they get it right, and not just rush to get something out there that may or may not work.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I like to do home repairs.  Maybe I can find a group for that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Im sure you can! Maybe write a blog about the repairs you can do to your home, since you are there anyway.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Do you use any other social media for connecting with new people.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
I use Facebook, Instagram, and sometimes TikTok
 You should do mini videos on easy things to DIY on TikTok.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: True.  I have to change out a few old style electrical plugs.  Maybe I can do something on that?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: right! That is a great idea!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I saw a few TikTok videos but never post a video.  Is it hard to post on there?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: not really. what i do is record the video beforehand, and then upload it.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Oh.  Okay.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: But you can also record it straight to the app.  You can also do the same on SnapChat

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I noticed all the videos are so short.  I think I will have to use YouTube for a longer video? I never used SnapChat.  Is that the one disappears after some time.?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, if you are doing longer videos, I recommend YouTube. What you can do, is do a short clip on TikToc and then in that clip instruct viewers to follow your YouTube Channel Yes Snap Chat dissappears after it's viewed

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Wow.  Thanks for all the great information.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Sure, my pleasure!

situation: I broke up with my girlfriend and sad about it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, how is your life at the moment? Do you want to talk about anything?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am doing ok. I just broke up with my girlfriend and sad about it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: so I hear you are not feeling at all your best at the moment?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is correct.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you feel as though you have no-one to talk to about this situation? I am happy to listen.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am so sad and just wonder why did it happen!!!

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you have no idea? Do you think you might have done something wrong or perhaps she was being unfaithful to you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: We had simple disagreement and both of us were keep fighting.. now I can not get over it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you consider that there might be any hope for the  two of you at all?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I don't know. What should I do?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Well, I think you should give her some space but people do sometimes get back together after they've separated

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I see your point.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You really do need to give her some space though - don't crowd her

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Should I call her directly? What should I say?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I would give her a little time. Maybe two or three days? She might need some time to clear her head

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's a good idea. What should I say? Should I apologize?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Perhaps you could send flowers and a note asking her if she'd like to talk?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That's a good idea. I will try that. Thank you.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: She might be feeling receptive to that but if she's not you might have to accept that it's over.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks.

situation: I have been dating this guy for 3 years and I'm tired of where our relationship is at the moment . I had expected him to propose long before now and since he hasn't I have chosen to call it quits as I'm no longer getting young and so afraid of wasting time with him.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello, how are you ?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Hello
 I am good, how are you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm doing well, but it could have been better

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What seems to be bothering you tonight?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, my boy friend of 3 years has refused to take our relationship to the next level and I'm kind of getting tired, I don't want to play games anymore

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So just to make sure I understand completely, you are ready to move on to the next step of your relationship and you don't feel as though your boyfriend is and this is making you anxious and upset,

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: exactly, I hate to feel that I'm wasting my time

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I completely understand that, as I was in a long term relationship and I felt as though my girlfriend at the time did not want to take things to the next step and I was not happy about it.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, I love him so dearly to want to settle down with him, but if he doesn't want that for me I would rather call it quits now than continue and be disappointed at the long run.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
Have you had that conversation with him? I know it might be a difficult conversation to have, but it is often good to get expectations out in the open so you are on the same page with your partner
.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Yes, sort of and he gave me the impression that he is not there yet and that was a like almost a year ago, I don't want it to look like I'm pushing him if I try to talk to him again about it. His nonchalant attitude in not seeing the seriousness of it is killing me, I'm just not happy.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
That is tough, but sometimes people just portray things differently, for instance I am also very laid back and nonchalant about most things which can lead to miscommunications. 
 I don't think it would be pushing if you haven't had that conversation in almost a year.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I hope you are right, just don't want to come across as a desperate person and that's why I'm setting myself up to call it quits if he tries to sound like he sounded the last time.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content:
You need to know where he is so you can make a good decision for yourself!
 I know it is difficult, but I know you can get through it!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: You are right, that's exactly what I'm going to do because the wait is killing me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Good, I am happy for you!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you very much, you've been a great help

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am glad I was able to help!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks, it was nice chatting with you.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You're welcome! If you need any more help just chat back with us again.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: no problem, take care.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You as well!
